title: Create: Industrial Tools
description: An Addon for Create that adds a full set of tools a tier above Netherite, along with a Copper Pickaxe that smelts blocks when charged.
body: > Requires [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) **This Mod is an Addon for the Create Mod. It aims at offering a set of tools above netherite for large or complex modpacks, while keeping a create aesthetic.** _Adds a new range of tools:_ - *Industrial Pickaxe* - *Industrial Sword* - *Industrial Axe* - *Industrial Shovel* - *Industrial Hoe* - *Copper Pickaxe* ![Mod Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7acb0f67169ddff8356cbaaff06eff60141eebc7.png) _**The use of mods such as JEI is *Highly* recommended**_ **Tools Description :** - All tools are a tier above netherite - Industrial Pickaxe can insta-mine stone *efficiency 5*, and insta-mine deepslate *efficiency 5* with the help of a *haste II beacon*. - Industrial Hoe (referenced as hoe but called sythe) is a hoe but can receive sword enchantments as well. Cannot deal damage to multiple entities. - Copper Pickaxe can be *charged* by right-clicking with coal, charcoal or a block of coal offhand. If charged, will drop the smelted drop of any block mined with it. By default, the maximum amount of charges the pickaxe can hold is 24. With the *Charge Capacity* enchantment, this limit can be increased. Level I > 36, level II > 49, Level III > 64. **Very special thanks to:** - [Kaupenjoe](https://www.youtube.com/@moddingbykaupenjoe) for his amazing modding tutorials - Kirpichom because why not Thanks to [Brassburg](https://modrinth.com/organization/brassburg) for creating [Create: Tools n Weapons](https://modrinth.com/mod/createtools-n-weapons), which inspired this project and was actually the template I used for this mod because at the time I didn't know how to add dependencies.
